attribs.name: repeating_npcaction_-MjISFkIeuo0nHZAqXQk_description
attribs.current:
Armor Class 11
Hit Points 50

A thin skin of material, wood boards or leather hide, stretched over flexible ribs. Used for small boats meant to shuttle from one place to another. Passengers and Crew sit within the hull. Sometimes a bait well or box is used for storage.

attribs.name: repeating_npcaction_-MjIT76NQw29d47gIruH_description
attribs.current:
Armor Class 15
Hit Points 100 (damage threshold 10)

They are usually part of small sailing boats, like Keelboats, Yahts. They offer space below deck for storage and/or around 2 rooms.

attribs.name: repeating_npcaction_-MjIVDVpHTak3yWuCgR-_description
attribs.current:
Armor Class 15
Hit Points 300 (damage threshold 15)

These Hulls are constructed to routinely encounter rough open water and/or combat. They range from Longboats to Sailboats. They may or may not have decks, but they generally are large enough to require more than one person to operate (unlike the flatboard, and keel hulls).

attribs.name: repeating_npcaction_-MjIXtXa3WlvRC8o1gqV_description
attribs.current:
Armor Class 15
Hit Points 500 (damage threshold 20)

These are the largest ships on the water. These include Warships and Galleys. The have multiple decks and require extensive crews to operate. 40+

attribs.name: repeating_npctrait_-MjIZeydv-BWNTwAWKn8_description
attribs.current: Any ship with a hull can gain one of the following upgrades. In some cases, an upgrade also provides a benefit to the ship’s other components.

attribs.name: repeating_npctrait_-MjIZkiKj2Z8Zlxwlmuk_description
attribs.current:
A tempest rages within these rune-etched, iron chains. Raiders and pirates who operate under the blessings of a storm god sometimes make use of this upgrade.

By draping the chains over a ship’s hull, the storm’s fury thrashes into the water around it. The water within 210 feet of the ship is difficult terrain for everything other than this ship.

attribs.name: repeating_npctrait_-MjIZo3487e9BOnUE-Oi_description
attribs.current: Crafted with materials harvested from the Shadowfell, this upgrade grants a ship an aura of dread. As an action, the ship can create a pulse of horrific energy. Every creature that is an enemy of the ship who is on board or within 210 feet of it must make DC 14 Wisdom saving throw. On a failed save, a creature is frightened of the ship for 1 minute. On a successful save, the creature is immune to this ability for 24 hours. Once this ability is used, it can’t be used again until 1d4 hours have passed.

attribs.name: repeating_npctrait_-MjIZuX9KOMs7y2tb9HH_description
attribs.current: This upgrade replaces a ship’s hull with supernatural ice drawn from the elemental planes. The hull and the other components of the ship are immune to cold damage but vulnerable to fire damage. The ship can also move at its normal speed over ice of any thickness, floating on the ice at the same depth as it would in water.

attribs.name: repeating_npcaction_-MjIksc25we7ZnSIdJJC_description
attribs.current:
Armor Class 13
Hit Points 300

The hulls of large sky ships are much like their water-borne counter parts, except maybe a few bottom facing ports.
